title: LobbyPearl
description: Fly with enderpearl in the lobby!
body:
# **Add a new feature to your Lobby!** 


**LobbyPearl** is a plugin that transforms the **ender pearl** into your personal, **ridable** vehicle within your server's **lobby** or hub world. 

With LobbyPearl, you can simply **throw** a special ender pearl and be **instantly** whisked away, soaring through the air, **exploring** your beautifully designed lobby from a whole new **perspective**.


## Features:
- Extensive config allowing you to customise the plugin to your liking!
- settings to prevent events such as: falldamage, drop, move
- Possibility to decide slot, name and enderpearl lore!


 
### 
<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
All permissions are customisable via the config.yml file, however, here is the list of the plugin's default permissions:

- lobbypearl.reload 
- lobbypearl.admin
- lobbypearl.bypass

</details>

###

<summary>Configuration</summary>

</details>
